name: fusebase-flow
description: Spec-to-deploy AI app-development workflow for client-facing teams, packaged with FuseBase Apps domain skills.

interface.longDescription: Activates Fusebase Flow lifecycle skills in Codex, including Product Owner and AI Developer workflows for spec-to-deploy app development.
defaultPrompt: Use Product Owner to plan a new ticket.
Use Fusebase Flow to verify this change.
Use AI Developer to run the implementation handoff.
